recommendations.title: Paradise Lost 3: Purgatory
recommendations.overview: A further investigation into the arrest of three teenagers convicted of killing three young boys in Arkansas who spent nearly 20 years in prison before being released after new DNA evidence indicated they may be innocent.

recommendations.title: Paradise Lost: The Child Murders at Robin Hood Hills
recommendations.overview: A horrific triple child murder leads to an indictment and trial of three nonconformist boys based on questionable evidence.

recommendations.title: Metallica: Some Kind of Monster
recommendations.overview: After bassist Jason Newsted quits the band in 2001, heavy metal superstars Metallica realize that they need an intervention. In this revealing documentary, filmmakers follow the three rock stars as they hire a group therapist and grapple with 20 year

recommendations.title: Extremely Wicked, Shockingly Evil and Vile
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the crimes of Ted Bundy, from the perspective of his longtime girlfriend, Elizabeth Kloepfer, who refused to believe the truth about him for years.

recommendations.title: Tony Robbins: I Am Not Your Guru
recommendations.overview: Granted unprecedented access, Berlinger captures renowned life and business strategist Tony Robbins behind the scenes of his mega seminar Date with Destiny, pulling back the curtain on this life-altering and controversial event, the zealous participa

recommendations.title: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
recommendations.overview: An enchanting making-of story told through all-new in-depth interviews and cast conversations, inviting fans on a magical first-person journey through one of the most beloved film franchises of all time.
recommendations.director: Giorgio Testi, Casey Patterson, Eran Creevy, Joe Pearlman

recommendations.title: The Fear of 13
recommendations.overview: After 23 years on Death Row a convicted murderer petitions the court asking to be executed, but as his story unfolds, it becomes clear that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Thin Blue Line
recommendations.overview: This unique documentary dramatically re-enacts the crime scene and investigation of a police officer's murder in Dallas.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Trouble
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murder, a clumsy electronics salesman faces police corruption and criminal conspiracies in an attempt to prove his innocence.
